emails.subject: Questar CA
emails.body: Jaime, This CA accidentally was sent to you with choice of law being New York. It should be Texas law. If Questar has seen this doc., we need to let them know. Thanks. Forwarded by Gerald Nemec/HOU/ECT on 06/16/2000 11:33 AM Eric Gillaspie 06/14/2000 01:37 PM
